description: Rental contract for a property (ṭabaqa) for a period of three years. Lessor (al-mālik) ʿAlī Nāfiʿ. Lessee: Mūsā/Moshe/Moses Schlesinger (موسى شليزنجر) from Austria(?), who signs his name in Latin script. Dated: 10 Jumādā I 1202 AH = 17 February 1788 CE. Not yet digitized.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
